title: indulgent mexican chicken tacos
description: a winey, shaggy, date-night mexican dish featuring vegan butter, rest, and anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients inspired by the cuisine of Yucatan, Mexico.
instructions: Season the chicken breasts with cumin, paprika, and salt. Let them rest for 10 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegan butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken breasts for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken breasts to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegan butter in the same skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, or until softened.
Add the minced garlic and diced chipotle peppers to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the lime juice and cook for 1 minute, or until the mixture is slightly reduced.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by slicing the cooked chicken breasts and placing them onto a warmed tortilla.
Top the chicken with the onion-chipotle mixture, sliced radishes, and chopped cilantro.
